---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Who has this problem? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- What would you like to see happen? Be specific. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposal better? -->

## Who Benefits

<!-- Which users benefit from this? -->

- [ ] Senders
- [ ] Institutions (schools, hospitals, utilities)
- [ ] Backend integrators (partners, developers)
- [ ] BarakahPay team
- [ ] Other:

## Impact

<!-- How significant is this? -->

- [ ] Critical — blocks core value delivery
- [ ] High — significantly improves user experience
- [ ] Medium — nice-to-have improvement
- [ ] Low — small polish

## Area

- [ ] Smart contracts
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Community / Governance
- [ ] Other:

## Mockups / Examples

<!-- If UI-related, share sketches or references. If technical, share code snippets or spec pointers. -->

## Related Issues

<!-- Link to related issues or discussions -->

## Are you willing to help implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, but I can review
